simple_types.name: CTRL_CSNEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRL_CSNEN_Field is
   Enabled,
   Disabled)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Enabled
enumeration_literals.description: Delay chain is not reset on active edge of CSN

simple_types.name: CTRL_DATAENABLE_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRL_DATAENABLE_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: CTRL_SCKEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRL_SCKEN_Field is
   Disabled,
   Enabled)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description: Delay chain and delayed sampling is active

simple_types.name: CTRL_SCKPHASE_Field
simple_types.code:
type CTRL_SCKPHASE_Field is
   Inverted,
   NonInverted)
  with Size => 1;

record_types.name: BIAS_Register

fields.name: HSBIAS
fields.description:
Slew setting for replica clock (used by the VPR coprocessor for
emulating a QSPI peripheral)

record_types.name: CTRL_Register
GPIOHSPADCTRL_Peripheral

fields.name: BIAS
fields.description:
Input sampling and buffering control (used by the VPR coprocessor for
emulating a QSPI peripheral)

variables.name: GLOBAL_GPIOHSPADCTRL_S_Periph
variables.code:
GLOBAL_GPIOHSPADCTRL_S_Periph : aliased GPIOHSPADCTRL_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => GLOBAL_GPIOHSPADCTRL_S_Base;
